title: Vera Bradley Stock Forecast and Price Targets
text: TipRanks aggregates analyst forecasts for Vera Bradley. The consensus among analysts shows varying confidence levels regarding the stock's near-term performance. Some analysts maintain bullish outlooks citing turnaround potential while others express concern about execution risks. Price target consensus has shifted downward reflecting recent earnings misses and guidance reductions. Analyst sentiment appears cautiously optimistic about the company's long-term recovery prospects.
